steps.title: Identify the claim
steps.content: The claim: the new CFRP-electrode harvester provides steady energy loads, an "absolute prerequisite" for wireless communication devices to be powered piezoelectrically.

steps.title: Pick the supporting finding
steps.content:
If "intermittent or unpredictable electrical supply undermines" wireless devices (A), then steady output is genuinely necessary — supporting the claim that the new harvester's stability matters. B undermines the claim (says non-CFRP also works); C contradicts it; D shifts the explanation to conductivity rather than supporting the steady-load claim.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
